---
title: "Evelyn Rodriguez"
---

## Hi there 👋

I'm Evelyn! I'm a graduate student at Baruch College in New York City. I'm studying Statistics and expect to graduate in 2027. 

I currently work in the banking industry as a web developer and have grown to find the intricacies of the world of banking and finance fascinating. I hope to use the skills gained in my graduate program to move into a data science role in the future. I'm excited to integrate statistical theory with my coding skills to tackle real world problems. 

In my free time, I enjoy: 📖 Reading sci-fi and fantasy novels 🏺 Making pottery 🎮 Playing video games

## Learn More
### [My Experience](https://drive.google.com/file/d/141AeWh0hMdgxtmWJHXnPLeQFGkTA-9WQ/view?usp=sharing)


### Connect With Me: [![github](https://www.readmecodegen.com/api/social-icon?name=github&color=%23ffffff)](https://github.com/er0driguez) [![LinkedIn](https://www.readmecodegen.com/api/social-icon?name=linkedin&color=ef4444)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/evelyn-rodriguez-nyc/)

```{r}
#| include: false
1+1
```
--------------
Last Updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%A %m %d, %Y at %H:%M%p")`
